steps.title: Collect z terms on the left and factor out z
steps.content:
Starting with $10yz - 9xz = 10xy - z$, add $z$ to both sides:
$$10yz - 9xz + z = 10xy$$
Factor $z$ from the left side:
$$z(10y - 9x + 1) = 10xy$$

steps.title: Divide both sides to isolate z
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $(10y - 9x + 1)$:
$$z = \frac{10xy}{10y - 9x + 1}$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
